# thoth_incident_forensics (Data Source)

Resolves an incident ID and returns its full forensics timeline.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `incident_id` (String) Incident identifier.

### Read-Only

- `agent_id` (String) Agent identifier associated with the incident session.
- `agent_name` (String) Agent name associated with the incident session.
- `attack_surface_json` (String) Derived attack-surface summary object as JSON.
- `events_json` (String) Ordered forensics events array as JSON.
- `incident_source` (String) Incident source subsystem.
- `response_json` (String) Full incident forensics response payload as JSON.
- `risk_score` (Number) Aggregated session risk score.
- `session_id` (String) Resolved session ID for this incident.
- `telemetry_summary_json` (String) Session telemetry summary object as JSON.
